free_text: data for 206,208Pb.
Proton scattering by 206,207,208Pb at 650 MeV;
Phenomenological analysis
LAMPF.
Beam polarization about 75-85%.
Targets isotopically enriched to 92-99%; areal
densities about 150 mg/cm2.
Beam polarization measured with and upstream CH2
polarimeter and by the ion source quench method.
Beam intensity monitored using 2 ionization chambers.
High Resolution Spectrometer.
Multi-wire drift chamber in focal plane.
Yields corrected for chamber efficiency, system live
time, and nonuniformity of a solid angle across the
horizontal direction in the focal plane.
Data received by email from N. Hintz, 2004/4/19
No reply from N. Hintz to author proof.
VM
SD: ref. added.
